goal: Implement Skills feature: graph-native behavioral expertise layer for sandbox agents (#177)

phases.name: Schema + Skill CRUD
phases.description: Database migration, TypeScript types, query functions, route handlers, and route registration. Makes WS-1 pass.

steps.name: Schema migration 0084: skill table and relation tables
steps.description: Create migration 0084_skill_table.surql with skill table (SCHEMAFULL), skill_requires, possesses, skill_supersedes, skill_evidence, governs_skill relation tables. Non-UNIQUE index on workspace+name. Apply via bun migrate.
acceptance_criteria: Migration 0084 creates skill table with all fields (name, description, version, status, workspace, source, source.type, source.source, source.ref, source.subpath, source.skills, created_by, created_at, updated_at)
Migration creates skill_requires, possesses, skill_supersedes, skill_evidence, governs_skill relation tables
Non-UNIQUE index idx_skill_workspace_name on skill FIELDS workspace, name
possesses has granted_at field, skill_evidence has added_at field, governs_skill has created_at field
bun migrate applies without error

steps.name: Skill domain types
steps.description: Create app/src/server/skill/types.ts with SkillStatus, SkillSourceType, SkillSource, SkillRecord, CreateSkillInput, SkillListItem, SkillDetail types. Follow learning/types.ts pattern.
acceptance_criteria: SkillStatus = 'draft' | 'active' | 'deprecated'
SkillSourceType = 'github' | 'git'
SkillSource has type, source, optional ref/subpath/skills
CreateSkillInput has name, description, version, source, optional required_tool_ids
SkillListItem has id, name, description, version, status, source, required_tools, agent_count, created_at
SkillDetailResponse has skill, required_tools, agents, governed_by
No null types -- use optional fields only

steps.name: Skill query functions: create and list
steps.description: Create app/src/server/skill/skill-queries.ts with createSkill (INSERT + skill_requires edges, app-layer name uniqueness check) and listSkills (with optional status filter). Follow learning/queries.ts pattern with surreal as first parameter.
acceptance_criteria: createSkill takes surreal, workspaceId, input, identityId, now as parameters
Pre-validates name uniqueness via SELECT query before CREATE
Creates skill record with status 'draft' and workspace reference
Creates skill_requires edges for each required_tool_id via RELATE
Returns created skill with id and status
listSkills returns skills filtered by workspace and optional status
Each list item includes required_tools and agent_count via graph traversal

steps.name: Skill route handlers: create and list
steps.description: Create app/src/server/skill/skill-route.ts with createSkillRouteHandlers factory. Implement handleCreate (POST) and handleList (GET with ?status filter). Follow learning-route.ts handler factory pattern.
acceptance_criteria: createSkillRouteHandlers(deps) returns handler functions
handleCreate validates required fields (name, description, version, source), returns 400 for missing fields
handleCreate returns 409 for duplicate name
handleCreate returns 201 with { skill: { id, name, status } }
handleList accepts ?status query param, returns { skills: SkillListItem[] }
Both handlers resolve identity from Better Auth session
Wide-event span attributes: skill.create.skill_id, skill.list.count

steps.name: Skill lifecycle query functions: activate and deprecate
steps.description: Add activateSkill and deprecateSkill to skill-queries.ts. Activate: draft -> active. Deprecate: active -> deprecated. Both return 409 for invalid transitions.
acceptance_criteria: activateSkill validates current status is 'draft', throws HttpError(409) otherwise
activateSkill updates status to 'active' and sets updated_at
deprecateSkill validates current status is 'active', throws HttpError(409) otherwise
deprecateSkill updates status to 'deprecated' and sets updated_at
Both throw HttpError(404) if skill not found in workspace

steps.name: Skill lifecycle route handlers and route registration
steps.description: Add handleActivate and handleDeprecate to skill-route.ts. Register all skill routes in start-server.ts. Enable WS-1 test.
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/workspaces/:wsId/skills/:skillId/activate returns 200 on success, 409 on invalid transition
POST /api/workspaces/:wsId/skills/:skillId/deprecate returns 200 on success, 409 on invalid transition
All skill routes registered in start-server.ts following existing pattern
WS-1 walking skeleton test passes: create -> activate -> list active

phases.name: Skill CRUD Completeness
phases.description: Detail, update, delete endpoints plus all CRUD error/edge scenarios.

steps.name: Skill detail query and route handler
steps.description: Add getSkillDetail to skill-queries.ts: returns skill with required_tools (via skill_requires), agents (via possesses), governed_by (via governs_skill). Add handleGetDetail route handler.
acceptance_criteria: getSkillDetail returns skill metadata + required_tools array + agents array + governed_by array
required_tools resolved via: SELECT out.id, out.name FROM skill_requires WHERE in = $skill
agents resolved via: SELECT in.name FROM possesses WHERE out = $skill
governed_by resolved via: SELECT in.id, in.name, in.status FROM governs_skill WHERE out = $skill
GET /api/workspaces/:wsId/skills/:skillId returns 200 with SkillDetailResponse
Returns 404 for nonexistent skill

steps.name: Skill update query and route handler
steps.description: Add updateSkill to skill-queries.ts and handleUpdate route handler. Supports updating name, description, version, source, required_tool_ids. Sets updated_at.
acceptance_criteria: updateSkill updates provided fields and sets updated_at
If name changes, validates new name uniqueness within workspace
If required_tool_ids provided, replaces skill_requires edges (delete old, create new)
PUT /api/workspaces/:wsId/skills/:skillId returns 200 with updated skill
Returns 404 for nonexistent skill

steps.name: Skill delete query and route handler
steps.description: Add deleteSkill to skill-queries.ts: validates 0 possesses edges, removes skill + skill_requires edges. Add handleDelete route handler.
acceptance_criteria: deleteSkill checks possesses edge count, throws HttpError(409) if > 0
Deletes skill record and all skill_requires edges in transaction
DELETE /api/workspaces/:wsId/skills/:skillId returns 200 on success
Returns 409 when agents possess the skill (C-9)
Returns 404 for nonexistent skill

steps.name: Enable remaining CRUD and lifecycle test scenarios
steps.description: Enable all skipped tests: C-1 through C-11, L-1 through L-5. Fix any issues found during test execution.
acceptance_criteria: C-1: create with source + tools passes
C-2: list all skills passes
C-3: list filtered by status passes
C-4: detail with tools passes
C-5: update metadata passes
C-6: delete unassigned skill passes
C-7: duplicate name returns 409
C-8: missing fields returns 400
C-9: delete assigned skill returns 409
C-10: nonexistent skill returns 404
C-11: skill with no tools has 0 skill_requires edges
L-1 through L-5 lifecycle tests pass

phases.name: Agent Creation Extension
phases.description: Extend agent creation transaction with possesses and can_use edges, extend agent detail with skills, add skill status validation.

steps.name: Extend CreateAgentInput types with skill_ids and additional_tool_ids
steps.description: Add skill_ids and additional_tool_ids optional fields to CreateAgentInput in agents/types.ts. Add skills array to AgentDetail type.
acceptance_criteria: CreateAgentInput has optional skill_ids: string[]
CreateAgentInput has optional additional_tool_ids: string[]
AgentDetail has optional skills: Array<{ id: string; name: string }>
Existing agent creation without skills continues to work

steps.name: Extend createAgentTransaction with skill validation and possesses/can_use edges
steps.description: Extend createAgentTransaction in agent-queries.ts: validate selected skills are active, add RELATE possesses and can_use edges to transaction SQL. Extend agent route to pass new fields.
acceptance_criteria: Pre-transaction validation: query selected skills, reject if any not found or not active (HttpError 409)
Transaction adds RELATE $identity->possesses->$skill SET granted_at = $now for each skill_id
Transaction adds RELATE $identity->can_use->$tool for each additional_tool_id
Agent creation with no skills/tools works unchanged (A-3)
Agent route handler parses skill_ids and additional_tool_ids from request body

steps.name: Extend agent detail with assigned skills
steps.description: Extend getAgentDetail in agent-queries.ts to include possessed skills. Add query for skills via possesses edges.
acceptance_criteria: Agent detail query includes: SELECT out.id, out.name FROM possesses WHERE in = $identity
AgentDetail response includes skills array with id and name
Agent detail with no skills returns empty skills array

steps.name: Enable agent creation and toolset test scenarios
steps.description: Enable all agent-creation-with-skills.test.ts scenarios: A-1 through A-6, T-1 through T-3. Enable WS-2 walking skeleton.
acceptance_criteria: A-1: agent with 2 skills has 2 possesses edges
A-2: agent with additional tools has can_use edges
A-3: agent without skills/tools has 0 possesses and 0 can_use edges
A-4: deprecated skill blocks creation (409)
A-5: nonexistent skill blocks creation
A-6: agent detail includes assigned skills
T-1: skill-derived tools resolved from skill_requires edges
T-2: shared tools deduplicated in effective toolset
T-3: effective toolset is union of skill-derived and can_use
WS-2: walking skeleton passes

phases.name: Policy Governance + WS-3
phases.description: governs_skill relation support in skill detail and remaining walking skeleton.

steps.name: Policy governance in skill detail and WS-3
steps.description: Skill detail already includes governed_by query from 02-01. Enable G-1, G-2, G-3 tests and WS-3 walking skeleton. Verify governs_skill edges are correctly traversed.
acceptance_criteria: G-1: governs_skill relation persisted via direct DB
G-2: skill detail includes governing policy name and status
G-3: skill without governing policy shows empty governed_by
WS-3: lifecycle governs visibility -- deprecated skill excluded from active listing

phases.name: Skill Library UI
phases.description: Frontend: skill list page, detail page, create form. React components with TanStack Router.

steps.name: Skill hooks and API client
steps.description: Create useSkills, useSkillDetail, useCreateSkill, useActivateSkill, useDeprecateSkill hooks in app/src/client/hooks/use-skills.ts. Follow existing hook patterns (e.g., useLearnings).
acceptance_criteria: useSkills fetches GET /api/workspaces/:wsId/skills with optional status filter
useSkillDetail fetches GET /api/workspaces/:wsId/skills/:skillId
useCreateSkill POSTs to /api/workspaces/:wsId/skills
useActivateSkill POSTs to /api/workspaces/:wsId/skills/:skillId/activate
useDeprecateSkill POSTs to /api/workspaces/:wsId/skills/:skillId/deprecate
Hooks handle loading, error, and success states

steps.name: Skill Library list page
steps.description: Create SkillLibraryPage with card-based list, status filter tabs, empty state. Register route in TanStack Router. Add navigation link.
acceptance_criteria: Route: /workspaces/:id/skills
Cards show name, version, status badge, description excerpt, source type, agent count
Status filter tabs: All, Active, Draft, Deprecated
Empty state with guidance text and Create Skill button
Navigation link added to sidebar/nav

steps.name: Skill detail page
steps.description: Create SkillDetailPage showing full metadata, required tools, assigned agents, governance info, and lifecycle action buttons (Activate/Deprecate).
acceptance_criteria: Route: /workspaces/:id/skills/:skillId
Shows skill name, description, version, status, source info
Required tools section lists tool names
Agents section lists agent names with links
Governed By section lists policy names with links
Activate button shown for draft skills
Deprecate button shown for active skills

steps.name: Create Skill form page
steps.description: Create SkillCreatePage with form: name, description, version, source type radio (GitHub/Git), repository/URL, ref, subpath, required tools checklist. Inline validation.
acceptance_criteria: Route: /workspaces/:id/skills/new
Source type radio toggles field labels (Repository vs URL)
Required tools checklist from workspace mcp_tool catalog
Inline validation for required fields (name, description, version, source)
Submit creates skill and redirects to Skill Library
Created skill defaults to draft status

phases.name: Agent Creation Wizard UI
phases.description: Frontend: 3-step wizard replacing current 2-step flow. Config > Skills > Tools > Create.

steps.name: Wizard Step 1: Config (consolidate runtime + form)
steps.description: Rewrite AgentCreatePage as 3-step wizard with useState state management. Step 1 consolidates runtime radio + agent form fields (name, description, model, scopes, sandbox config).
acceptance_criteria: Runtime is a radio group (Sandbox/External), not separate step
Sandbox config fields shown conditionally
Name uniqueness validated via existing check-name API
Next button enabled only when required fields valid
Wizard state preserved across steps (useState at page level)

steps.name: Wizard Step 2: Skills checklist + Step 3: Tools review
steps.description: Step 2 shows active workspace skills as checklist with count badge. Step 3 shows skill-derived tools (read-only) and additional tools (editable). Create Agent button on Step 3 submits with skill_ids and additional_tool_ids.
acceptance_criteria: Step 2 fetches active skills and shows checklist with name, version, description
Count badge updates on check/uncheck
Skip button advances with 0 skills
Empty state when no active skills
Step 3 shows skill-derived tools with 'via skill X' labels (client-side resolution)
Shared tools listed once with all source skill names
Additional tools checklist excludes skill-derived tools
Total effective tools summary shown
Create Agent submits with skill_ids and additional_tool_ids
Back navigation preserves selections
